name: Broiled Banana Chocolate Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1 package Reduce calorie instant Chocolate pudding
1 medium Banana, peeled and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl combine the milk and chocolate pudding mix.
2. Pour the mixture into a flameproof dish and chill.
- This can be prepared up to one day in advance.
3. Arrange the banana slices over top of the pudding.
4. Sprinkle with brown sugar.
5. Place in oven set to broil and heat until the sugar melts and is bubbly, about 1 minute.
- Be careful not to burn the bananas.
Each serving contains approximately half a fruit, one cup of milk, and an optional 10 calories from Weight Watchers pamphlet (1988).
